channel.title: Khalid Alnujaidi — Theoretical & Engineering Essays
channel.description: Deep-dive essays on system architecture, computer vision, embedded hardware, and autonomous AI orchestration.

item.title: The Address & the Direction: A Geometry of the Divine
item.description: An interactive cosmology: how sacred architecture shifts from ascent toward a locatable god to orientation toward an omnipresent one — pyramid to cube.

item.title: Stalking the Wild Pendulum: Continuous Fields and Time in N-Dimensional Space
item.description: An interactive deep-dive into continuous fields and the treatment of time in N-dimensional space.

item.title: The Tenure Bottleneck: Why Big Tech Stagnates While Startups Innovate
item.description: Why credibility measured in tenure has become a bottleneck for innovation, and how startups route around it.
